# Pkce.GenerateState method

Generates an opaque, unguessable `state` value binding an authorization request to the user-agent session (R-23.5-g): 32 random bytes, base64url-encoded. Randomness is injectable.

```csharp
public static string GenerateState(Func<int, byte[]>? randomSource = null)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| randomSource | OPTIONAL byte source; defaults to the CSPRNG. |

## Return Value

The generated state.
